---
title: "Projects"
toc: true
listing:
  - id: ml-projects
    type: grid
    contents: ml-projects.yml
    sort: "date asc"
    grid-columns: 3
    fields: [image, title, description, author, categories, date]
   

  - id: ned-projects
    type: grid
    contents: ned-projects.yml
    sort: "date asc"
    grid-columns: 3
    fields: [image, title, description, author, categories, date]
    
---

## Machine Learning

This section covers applied machine learning projects including statistical analysis, data visualisation, and predictive modelling.

::: {#ml-projects}
:::

## New Enterprise Development

This module focuses on the process of developing and assessing new business ventures, guiding us from initial idea generation through to market positioning and implementation. Our group developed [VIVA]{style="font-weight:500; color:#185FA5;"}, a wearable device designed to be placed on the hamstring, monitoring muscle activity and detecting early signs of potential strain.

::: {#ned-projects}
:::
